summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ChatPage (Messages) for both Caregiver and Family dashboards. All 15 features verified successfully: Messages list with conversations, avatars (individual photos and purple group icons with Users), unread badges, search functionality, chat view with message bubbles (dark gray received #1c1c1e, green sent #25D366), Photo attached with image icon, timestamps with checkmarks, green input border on focus, send button color change, message sending, and navigation (chat back to list, messages back to home).
passed_tests: Caregiver Messages list shows 4 conversations (Mary Smith POA, Sarah Johnson Supervisor, Michael Chen Weekend Caregiver, Care Team Handoff group)
Individual conversations show correct photo avatars
Group chat (Care Team Handoff) shows purple circle (#7c3aed) with Users icon
Unread badges: Sarah Johnson has green '1' badge, Care Team Handoff has green '2' badge
Search bar present and filters conversations correctly
Clicking conversation opens chat view with correct header (back arrow + avatar + name + Online status)
Chat view: received messages in dark gray (#1c1c1e)
Chat view: sent messages in green (#25D366)
Sent messages show timestamp with double checkmark (CheckCheck) icon
Photo attachment shows 'Photo attached' with Image icon in dark overlay
Message input field gets green border (#25D366) when focused
Send button changes from dark gray (#1c1c1e) to green (#25D366) when text is entered
Sending message adds it to chat and clears input
Chat back button returns to messages list
Messages back button returns to home tab
Group chat header shows purple Users icon avatar
Family dashboard Messages tab uses ChatPage with role=FAMILY
Family conversations: Family Group (group with purple icon, 3 unread), Julia Martinez (Caregiver), Tom Smith (Brother)
Family Group chat shows purple Users icon in header
seed_data_creation: None - all data mocked in ChatPage.jsx

mocked_apis_list: All conversation and message data is hardcoded in ChatPage.jsx
Caregiver conversations: Mary Smith (POA), Sarah Johnson (Supervisor), Michael Chen (Weekend Caregiver), Care Team Handoff (group)
Family conversations: Family Group, Julia Martinez (Caregiver), Tom Smith (Brother)
Message templates with timestamps, Photo attached placeholder

context_for_next_testing_agent: ChatPage component fully tested for both Caregiver and Family roles. Key data-testids: messages-list-view, messages-back-btn, search-conversations, conversation-{id} (poa/supervisor/weekend/team for caregiver; family/caregiver/tom for family), chat-view, chat-back-btn, chat-input, chat-send-btn. Login flow: Desktop 1200x800 > nav-login-btn > select role > fill email/password placeholders > Sign In > switch to mobile 430x932 > click nav-chat via JS. ChatPage shared by both dashboards via role prop (UserRole.CAREGIVER or UserRole.FAMILY).
